name: Security Infrastructure
description: Next-gen firewalls, IDS/IPS, endpoint protection, email security, web security, vulnerability management, SIEM & SOAR, and certificate/PKI — threat detection and SecOps. ESCU detections are distributed across subcategories 10.1–10.8.
quickTip: Forward firewall logs (syslog) and install the vendor TA (Palo Alto, Fortinet, etc.). Use `import_sse_detections.py` to import ESCU detections, then `redistribute_sse_ucs.py` to place them in the right subcategories.

subcategories.name: Next-Gen Firewalls (Security-Focused)
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Palo Alto Networks Add-on (`Splunk_TA_paloalto`), Cisco Firepower TA, Fortinet FortiGate TA.

subcategories.name: Endpoint Detection & Response (EDR)
subcategories.primaryAppTa: CrowdStrike, Microsoft Defender, Carbon Black, or other EDR TAs.

subcategories.name: Email Security
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Microsoft Defender for Office 365, Proofpoint, Mimecast, or email gateway TAs.

subcategories.name: Web Security / Secure Web Gateway
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Zscaler, Cisco Umbrella, or SWG/proxy TAs.

subcategories.name: Vulnerability Management
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Qualys, Tenable, Rapid7, or vuln scanner TAs.

subcategories.name: SIEM & SOAR
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk Enterprise Security, SOAR apps, or correlation search content.

subcategories.name: Certificate & PKI Management
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Certificate monitoring apps, CT log APIs, or PKI TAs.

subcategories.name: ESCU 2025-2026 Analytic Stories
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk Security Essentials / ESCU (security_content analytic stories, 2025–2026 coverage).

subcategories.name: Detection Efficacy & YARA Monitoring
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk Enterprise Security (Notable Event framework), custom metrics, YARA / file scanning integrations.

subcategories.name: Vendor-Specific Security Detections
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk Add-ons for Fortinet, Palo Alto Networks, Check Point, CrowdStrike, Zscaler, VMware Carbon Black, Tenable, Tanium.

subcategories.name: Industry-Specific Compliance & Fraud Detection
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Financial cores (FIS, core banking), payment gateways, HIPAA/healthcare TAs, retail POS, Splunk Enterprise Security, government/FedRAMP TAs.

subcategories.name: CIM Data Model Standard Monitoring Patterns
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk Common Information Model (CIM) — any Technology Add-on that maps to CIM; `datamodel.conf` acceleration recommended for `tstats`.

subcategories.name: OT Security and MITRE ATT&CK for ICS
subcategories.primaryAppTa: OT Security Add-on for Splunk (Splunkbase 5151), requires Splunk Enterprise Security. Provides 35+ correlation searches, NERC CIP dashboards, and MITRE ATT&CK for ICS framework mappings.
subcategories.dataSources: OT Security Add-on correlation searches, ICS/SCADA syslog, OT firewall logs, historian exports, asset inventory, vulnerability scanner data from OT networks.
